description: Regression thresholds for automated parity checks. Metric names match the bench command's BenchResult JSON tags. error_rate_pct is derived as error_count / num_prompts * 100.

tokens_per_second.description: Higher is better. Flag if throughput drops more than 5% vs baseline.

ttft_p50_ms.description: Lower is better. Flag if exceeds 15ms or regresses >20%.

itl_p50_ms.description: Lower is better. Flag if exceeds 10ms or regresses >20%.

error_rate_pct.description: Derived from error_count/num_prompts. Flag if exceeds 1%.
